meta.note: Portfolio strategically redesigned 2026-05-23 based on hands-off mandate and tournament evidence. Newsletter shelved. Core strategy: rare disease medical trackers (Etsy + KDP).

businesses.name: Rare Disease Medical Trackers
businesses.tagline: Condition-specific symptom trackers for diagnosed patients to show their doctors.

log.note: Portfolio redesign: Etsy strategy pivoted to rare disease trackers. Medical guidelines-based design. 12-condition portfolio planned (IBS, Endometriosis, ME/CFS launch Month 1).
Shop live: claritytemplatesart.etsy.com — setup complete, awaiting first listings

businesses.name: KDP Condition Tracking Journals
businesses.tagline: Symptom tracking journals for chronic conditions (complement to Etsy trackers).

log.note: Strategy pivoted: 12 condition-specific journals planned to pair with Etsy trackers. Pen name: Dr. Symptom Trackers.

businesses.name: TALEB's £100k Playbook + Subscription
businesses.tagline: Teach other OpenClaw operators how to build autonomous businesses using TALEB's system.

log.note: Phase 2 business: Playbook (£50, one-time) + Subscription (£20/month). Launch planned Month 3 once tracker portfolio is proven.

businesses.name: Sterling Strategy Newsletter [SHELVED]
businesses.tagline: [ARCHIVED] Strategy newsletter with sponsorships. Shelved due to hands-off mandate incompatibility.

log.note: Strategic decision: Newsletter shelved. 5 issues written but not published. Reason: Sponsorship model requires human interaction (emails, Zoom calls) incompatible with hands-off directive. Content archived; can be repurposed later.
5 full issues written (35,000+ words on antifragility, unit economics, positioning, distribution, pricing)
